rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in annex agree blocks of component types when concrete bounds or visible features are provided.
Use implementation-level annex agree only for assignments valid in that scope, not for assumptions or guarantees.
generic_rules: Assumptions should constrain inputs using visible feature names and case-provided thresholds.
Guarantees should express output properties as boolean expressions derived from input conditions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Comparison expressions must evaluate to bool; use helper equations (eq) to define range conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not embed implementation-specific assignments in type-level annex agree blocks.
Avoid using unnamed literals or non-visible identifiers in assumptions or guarantees.
